name: Breakfast Casserole (Pensylvannia Dutch "Cowboy")
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a 9 x 13 baking dish.
2. Place bread cubes in the dish.
3. Add the browning sausage on top of the bread.
4. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the sausage.
5. Pour egg mixture (beat eggs, add milk, salt, and mustard) evenly over the top.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
8. Bake in a covered dish for 45 minutes.
9. Allow casserole to stand for about 5 minutes before cutting.
